2026-06-11TCFederal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment Board ActReappointment of a part-time member of the Federal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment Board.Reappointment of Deborah Cooper of Ottawa, Ontario, as a part-time member of the Federal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment Board, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of three years.N/A
act: Federal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment Board Act
subject: Reappointment of a part-time member of the Federal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment Board.
precis: Reappointment of Deborah Cooper of Ottawa, Ontario, as a part-time member of the Federal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment Board, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of three years.
